title: Automating workflows and file organization with Antigravity
summary: Google Antigravity automates file system workflows and repository organization using time boxes and tags. The tool helps developers organize GitHub repositories and local files across multiple projects to improve efficiency and reduce time spent searching for files.
writeup: This video demonstrates Google Antigravity, a tool that automates file system workflows and repository organization using time boxes and tags. It covers how developers can organize GitHub repositories and local files across multiple projects. The stated benefit: less time spent searching for files and improved efficiency in handling files across projects.
